text.message: Bro, I’ll trade when I have it
Can I like play the game
6 robs three orbits and perma blocked
Straight up robbing fed wheat port to blue
Iloke it’s a principle now, you only robbed in last you can pay 2
I didnt rob anyone but blue
8 robs 4 orbits in last is insane
I mean it is lowkey necessary
You hold onto it like the grinch lol
I’m just trying to get a settle
People need wood if you're not going to trade it they need to take
It's not personal, just the game
How about, I won’t rob but trade next one
Like how can I trade one for one while losing more cards than producing
